creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Occasionally a python3 specific version of a port does need to be built, it is preferable that we don't if we don't have to. When it is needed it is normally a py3 variant not a specific python version. If lack of a py3 variant blocks 20 other ports it is more likely to be accepted that one that blocks a single port.

When packaging as a py3 dependency for another port, there are issues that are still being worked on, but my suggestions are enough to build and test your application. If you are looking to add it as a new port that will be py3.x only then compromises may need to be made for a while.

See my comment for net/s3ql - bug #203760 comment #19
